title: Command Mini Hook, Value Pack of 18 Mini Hooks and 24 Small Adhesive Strips, Transparent - Damage Free Hanging - Holds up to 225 gm (Packaging May Vary)
features: LITTLE HELPERS: These hooks hold strongly on a variety of smooth indoor surfaces including painted walls, smooth ceilings, finished wood, glass, tile, and metal. Great for hanging keys, calendar, kitchen utensil and lightweight decorations
NO TOOLS REQUIRED: Hang your accessories where you want without nails or a hammer
DAMAGE-FREE DECORATING: Say goodbye to holes or sticky residue on your walls. Command Adhesive Strips by 3M are easy to use and help keep your walls looking beautiful without any marks

REMOVES CLEANLY: These hooks leave no sticky adhesive behind. Thanks to the Command stretch-release removable adhesive technology, they hold strongly yet you can remove them without leaving traces or glue residue
INCLUDES: The pack contains 18 transparent mini hooks and 24 adhesive strips, holding 225 gm. Not suitable for hanging picture frames
